scripts.start: npm run stop-ports && concurrently "npm start --prefix api-gateway" "npm start --prefix user-service" "npm start --prefix course-service" "npm start --prefix enrollment-service" "npm start --prefix content-service" "npm start --prefix progress-service" "npm start --prefix review-service"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix course-service && npm install --prefix enrollment-service && npm install --prefix content-service && npm install --prefix progress-service && npm install --prefix review-service
